shakshi: The third altar in the Fae court temple — found only after passing Koga and Mona
Zoha met — Goddess of Tranquility and Warriordom, the synthesis of what Koga and Mona taught separately
Koga and Mona both passed — the gate for Zoha's altar and the bone flute commission
Karlia met — Nymph craftsperson, commissions the bone flute from demon bones
The player descended to Sulphera to gather demon bones for Karlia's commission
The material collected — every prior investment in Sulphera access flows through this moment
Karlia is crafting the bone flute — the commission is placed and the work has begun
Zoha's gift, crafted by Karlia from demon bones — can pull the player from any Sulphera ring with no reset consequence
The player can now exit any Sulphera ring without reset consequence — Fae relationships make underworld survival possible
The unified state Zoha embodies — calm engagement, the synthesis of Chaos magic and Warriordom into a single register
